summary: Fetch MASN and MASN2 data via contentCollections
description:
GIVEN a user has entitlements for MASN
AND the user launches the MLB.tv Core app

*NOTE:* 
MASN entitlement = MASN_110 and MASN_120

MASN Test users:

|Username|Password|
|[masn@gmail.com|mailto:masn@gmail.com]|Password4MASN|
|[masnims@gmail.com|mailto:masnims@gmail.com] (In Market)|Password4MASN|
|[masnoom@gmail.com|mailto:masnoom@gmail.com] (Out of Market)|Password4MASN|
|[masnintl@gmail.com|mailto:masnintl@gmail.com] (International)|Password4MASN|

steps.action: WHEN the user successfully logs in
steps.result:
THEN a "contentCollections" network call is made via "graphql"
AND the data returned from "contentCollections" is stored in Redux under "rsn"

**NOTE:** This needs to be tested with access to network calls, and Redux. Best way is via Chrome. Redux is a browser extension that may need to be downloaded and added to your browser.
